# Theme governance (generated by dsmcp)

Files:
- `lib/theme/app_theme.dart` — generated `Map<String, ThemeData>` per mode (// dsmcp:generated).
- `lib/theme/theme_controller.dart` — N-mode ChangeNotifier (setMode).
- `CLAUDE.md`, `.cursorrules` — agent rules.
- `theme-governance.config.json` — project config (modes, scope, overrides).
- `.husky/pre-commit`, `.github/workflows/dsmcp.yml`, `dsmcp.stop-hook.json` —
  enforcement wiring (`npx --yes dsmcp validate .`).

Modes: light, dark, dim, midnight, high-contrast-light, high-contrast-dark, sepia, solarized-light, solarized-dark, nord, love, future, synthwave, sakura, forest, ocean, coffee, aurora (default: light).
